video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Aston Villa welcome Nottingham Forest in the Europa League semi-final second leg, needing to overturn a 1–0 deficit. Forest aim to defend their narrow lead and secure a place in the final. Who will take the win? Catch all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26 match between Aston Villa and Nott'm Forest, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Freiburg face Braga in the Europa League semi-final second leg, trailing 2–1 on aggregate. With home advantage, Freiburg aim to overturn the deficit, but Braga’s resilience promises a tense battle. Who will take the win? Catch all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26 match between Freiburg and Braga, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
